introSection: Alien Taxi is a spinning roller coaster built by German manufacturer Maurer Söhne currently located at Trans Studio Cibubur in East Jakarta, Jakarta, Indonesia.

sections.title: History
sections.content: The ride opened at Drievliet Family Park under the name Xtreme on 3 April 2004 and operated for three seasons. It was sold to Blue Bayou Dixie Landin' where it reopened on May 26, 2007. Xtreme operated there for ten years before it was dismantled in 2017. The coaster later reopened in July 2019 at Trans Studio Cibubur as Alien Taxi.

fullText:
Alien Taxi is a spinning roller coaster built by German manufacturer Maurer Söhne currently located at Trans Studio Cibubur in East Jakarta, Jakarta, Indonesia.

The ride opened at Drievliet Family Park under the name Xtreme on 3 April 2004 and operated for three seasons. It was sold to Blue Bayou Dixie Landin' where it reopened on May 26, 2007. Xtreme operated there for ten years before it was dismantled in 2017. The coaster later reopened in July 2019 at Trans Studio Cibubur as Alien Taxi.
